scenePacks.stepOneAltText: Girl in a kitchen after cooking gone wrong

rounds.completionPrompt: She is worried.
rounds.stepTwoAltText: Cooking gone wrong scene with the girl's facial expression circled
distractorOptionLabels: Happy because she won a prize.
Bored because she has nothing to do.
Cheerful because she is on holiday.

rounds.completionPrompt: The food in the oven is burning.
rounds.stepTwoAltText: Cooking gone wrong scene with the smoky oven circled
rounds.correctOptionLabel: The food in the oven is burning
distractorOptionLabels: The girl has dropped the cake on the floor.
The fridge door has been left open.
The girl has run out of flour.
The utensils have fallen off the counter.
The girl cannot find the cake tin.

rounds.openingPrompt: Why is there smoke in the kitchen?
rounds.completionPrompt: The cake has been left in the oven for too long.
rounds.stepTwoAltText: Cooking gone wrong scene with the smoky oven circled
rounds.correctOptionLabel: The cake has been left in the oven for too long
distractorOptionLabels: The girl is boiling water for tea.

The window is letting fog into the house.
The girl is dusting the cupboards.
Someone is having a barbecue outside.
The girl is cleaning the oven.
A cloud has drifted into the kitchen.

rounds.openingPrompt: What was the girl doing before she noticed the smoke?
rounds.completionPrompt: She was tidying up after baking.

rounds.openingPrompt: What do you think the girl will do next?
rounds.completionPrompt: She will ask an adult to help her take the cake out of the oven.
rounds.stepTwoAltText: Cooking gone wrong scene used for the next step question
rounds.correctOptionLabel: The girl will ask an adult to help her take the cake out of the oven
distractorOptionLabels: She will start baking another cake.
